data.name: InvalidLoginOrPasswordTitle
data.value: Invalid login or password.

data.name: InvalidLoginOrPasswordDetail
data.value: An incorrect login or password has been entered. Please check that the entered data is correct and try again.

data.name: UsernameAlreadyTakenTitle
data.value: Username taken.

data.name: UsernameAlreadyTakenDetail
data.value: The specified username is already in use by another user. Please choose a different name.

data.name: UserNotFoundTitle
data.value: User not found.

data.name: UserNotFoundDetail
data.value: The user with the specified data was not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: InvalidPasswordTitle
data.value: Invalid password.

data.name: InvalidPasswordDetail
data.value: The entered password is incorrect. Please try again or use password recovery.

data.name: TestParams
data.value: $A$ is less than $B$ but more than $C$.

data.name: NoChangesDetectedDetail
data.value: The update attempt did not lead to changes, since the transferred data coincides with the current ones. Check the entered data and try again.

data.name: NoChangesDetectedTitle
data.value: No changes to apply.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictsTitle
data.value: Concurrency Conflicts.

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictsDetail
data.value: Your transaction could not be completed due to a conflict with another active transaction. Try again later.

data.name: DoesNotMatchSignatureTitle
data.value: File signature does not match.

data.name: DoesNotMatchSignatureDetail
data.value: The file is not in the correct format. Please check that the file you are uploading meets the required requirements and formats.

data.name: OneOrMoreValidationErrorsOccurred
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: EmptyUniqueIdentifierTitle
data.value: Empty unique identifier (GUID).

data.name: EmptyUniqueIdentifierDetail
data.value: The specified unique identifier (GUID) cannot be empty (all zeros). Please provide a correct unique ID to proceed with the transaction.

data.name: PublicationNotFoundTitle
data.value: Publication not found.

data.name: PublicationNotFoundDetail
data.value: The publication with the specified data was not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: AuthorNotFoundTitle
data.value: Author not found.

data.name: AuthorNotFoundDetail
data.value: The author with the specified data was not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: UserIsNotAuthorOfThisPublicationTitle
data.value: The user is not the author of this publication.

data.name: UserIsNotAuthorOfThisPublicationDetail
data.value: The user listed is not the author of this publication. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: UserAlreadyHasPremiumTitle
data.value: The user already has a premium

data.name: UserAlreadyHasPremiumDetail
data.value: This user has already purchased a premium. There is no way to buy again.

data.name: UserDoesNotHavePremiumTitle
data.value: The user does not have a premium.

data.name: UserDoesNotHavePremiumDetail
data.value: The user does not have an active premium subscription. Please check your account or purchase a suitable package to gain access to additional features.

data.name: InvalidApiKeyTitle
data.value: Invalid API-key.

data.name: InvalidApiKeyDetail
data.value: The provided API key is invalid or incorrect. Make sure you are using the correct key and try again.

data.name: FailedToReceiveFileTitle
data.value: Failed to receive file.

data.name: FailedToReceiveFileDetail
data.value: The requested file could not be received. Please try again later.

data.name: FailedToCreateFileTitle
data.value: Failed to create file.

data.name: FailedToCreateFileDetail
data.value: The file was not created. Try again later.

data.name: FileNotFoundTitle
data.value: File not found.

data.name: FileNotFoundDetail
data.value: The file not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: FileSizeLimitExceededTitle
data.value: File size limit exceeded.

data.name: FileSizeLimitExceededDetail
data.value: The uploaded file size exceeds the maximum allowed $A$ MB. Please reduce the file size and try again.

data.name: FileAlreadyExistsTitle
data.value: The file already exists.

data.name: FileAlreadyExistsDetail
data.value: The requested file with the specified name already exists in the system. Please check your details and choose a different file name or delete the existing file before trying again.

data.name: EmailAlreadyTakenTitle
data.value: Email taken.

data.name: EmailAlreadyTakenDetail
data.value: The specified email is already in use by another user. Please choose a different email.

data.name: PhoneNumberAlreadyTakenTitle
data.value: Phone number taken.

data.name: PhoneNumberAlreadyTakenDetail
data.value: The specified phone number is already in use by another user. Please choose a different phone number.

data.name: UserAlreadyConfirmedEmailTitle
data.value: The user has already confirmed the email.

data.name: UserHasNotConfirmedEmailTitle
data.value: The user has not confirmed the email.

data.name: UserAlreadyConfirmedPhoneNumberTitle
data.value: The user has already confirmed the phone number.

data.name: UserHasNotConfirmedPhoneNumberTitle
data.value: The user has not confirmed the phone number.

data.name: UserAlreadyConfirmedEmailDetail
data.value: This user's email has already been verified. There is no need to verify again.

data.name: UserHasNotConfirmedEmailDetail
data.value: User must confirm their email to activate all features. Please check your email for a confirmation link.

data.name: UserAlreadyConfirmedPhoneNumberDetail
data.value: This user's phone number has already been verified. No additional verification attempts are required.

data.name: UserHasNotConfirmedPhoneNumberDetail
data.value: The user must verify their phone number to ensure additional security and access to services. Check the SMS for a verification code.

data.name: InvalidTokenTitle
data.value: Invalid token.

data.name: InvalidTokenDetail
data.value: The token you provided is invalid or incorrect. Make sure you are using the correct token and try again.

data.name: InvalidCodeTitle
data.value: Invalid code.

data.name: InvalidCodeDetail
data.value: The code you provided is invalid or incorrect. Please make sure you are using the correct code and try again.

data.name: CodeAlreadySentTitle
data.value: Code has already been sent.

data.name: CodeAlreadySentDetail
data.value: You have already requested a code, please wait $A$ minutes before trying again.

data.name: LetterAlreadySentTitle
data.value: Letter has already been sent.

data.name: LetterAlreadySentDetail
data.value: You have already requested an email, please wait $A$ minutes before trying again.

data.name: OrderNotFoundTitle
data.value: Order not found.

data.name: OrderNotFoundDetail
data.value: The order not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: PaymentNotCompletedTitle
data.value: Payment not completed.

data.name: PaymentNotCompletedDetail
data.value: Payment not completed. Make sure you have paid the payment, it may require confirmation from our side.

data.name: OrderAlreadyIssuedOrCanceledTitle
data.value: The order has already been issued or canceled.

data.name: OrderAlreadyIssuedOrCanceledDetail
data.value: Your order has already been issued or canceled. For more information, please contact technical support.

data.name: FailedToCreatePaymentTitle
data.value: Failed to create payment.

data.name: FailedToCreatePaymentDetail
data.value: Failed to create payment. Possibly the problem is on the provider's side, we are already solving the problem.

data.name: OrderCannotBeIssuedTitle
data.value: The order cannot be issued.

data.name: OrderCannotBeIssuedDetail
data.value: The order could not be issued. The recipient's account may have been deleted or other problems may have occurred. Please contact technical support.

data.name: ProductNotFoundTitle
data.value: Product not found.

data.name: ProductNotFoundDetail
data.value: The product with the specified data was not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: IncorrectRequestTitle
data.value: Incorrect request.

data.name: IncorrectRequestDetail
data.value: The request sent is invalid, check the endpoint signature.

data.name: RateLimitExceededTitle
data.value: Rate limit exceeded.

data.name: RateLimitExceededDetail
data.value: Rate limit exceeded, too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: EmptyFileTitle
data.value: The sent file is empty.

data.name: EmptyFileDetail
data.value: You have submitted an empty file, please select a non-empty file and try again.

data.name: NotificationNotFoundTitle
data.value: Notification not found.

data.name: NotificationNotFoundDetail
data.value: The notification not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.

data.name: UserNotificationNotFoundTitle
data.value: User Notification not found.

data.name: UserNotificationNotFoundDetail
data.value: The user notification not found. Please check that the information entered is correct.
